### Multi-rate Tg analysis

| Rate | Tg_MD |
|------|-------|
| 40 K/ns | 194.4 K |
| 160 K/ns | 185.6 K |
| 400 K/ns | 182.1 K |

**Log-linear**: Tg = 214.0 + -5.42·ln(Γ)  R²=0.9841
→ Tg at 1.67e-10 K/ns (DSC-equivalent, 10 K/min) = **194.4 K**  (theoretical DSC-equivalent experimental Tg)
